---
title: "Six panel figure"
author: "Luisa Fitzpatrick"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 6)
```


**Requirements:**
- BaFTA outputs in `bafta_outputs/` directory
- BaSTA outputs in `basta_outputs/` directory  
- Growth curve data: `Growthcurvedata.csv`
- Main data: `OcellatusNatPop_FullDataset_2025.csv`

```{r six-panel-figure}
# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(BaSTA)
library(BaFTA)

# ============== LOAD ALL REQUIRED MODEL OUTPUTS ==============
# Load BaFTA outputs (adjust paths if needed)
out_CM_CP <- readRDS("bafta_outputs/out_CM_CP.rds")
out_CM_OR <- readRDS("bafta_outputs/out_CM_OR.rds")

# Load BaSTA outputs (adjust paths if your BaSTA outputs are elsewhere)
# These should be Gompertz-Makeham models for both populations
out_CP <- readRDS("basta outputs/out_CP.rds")          # Cool highland
out_OR_GM <- readRDS("basta outputs/out_OR_GM.rds")    # Warm lowland

# Load main data if not already in environment
data <- read.csv(file = "OcellatusNatPop_FullDataset_2025.csv", 
                   na = c("", "NA", ".", "?"))[ ,c('Year', 'FemID', 'Site', 'Age', 'Clutch')]
  
data <- data %>%
    rename(year = Year, indID = FemID, site = Site, nOffspring = Clutch)
  
data$indID <- as.factor(data$indID)
data$site <- as.factor(data$site)
data$Age <- as.integer(data$Age)
data$nOffspring <- as.integer(data$nOffspring)
  
data <- subset(data,
                !is.na(indID) & indID != 0 &
                !is.na(Age) & Age != 0 &
                !is.na(nOffspring) & nOffspring != 0)

# Extract BaFTA fertility trajectories
fert_OR <- data.frame(
  age = out_CM_OR$x,
  median = out_CM_OR$fert[, "Mean"],
  lower = out_CM_OR$fert[, "Lower"],
  upper = out_CM_OR$fert[, "Upper"],
  site = "Warm lowland"
)

fert_CP <- data.frame(
  age = out_CM_CP$x,
  median = out_CM_CP$fert[, "Mean"],
  lower = out_CM_CP$fert[, "Lower"],
  upper = out_CM_CP$fert[, "Upper"],
  site = "Cool highland"
)

fert_data <- bind_rows(fert_OR, fert_CP)

# Extract BaFTA parameter posteriors
params_OR <- as.data.frame(out_CM_OR$theta) %>%
  mutate(site = "Warm lowland")
params_CP <- as.data.frame(out_CM_CP$theta) %>%
  mutate(site = "Cool highland")

params_combined <- bind_rows(params_OR, params_CP) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(b0, b3),
               names_to = "parameter", 
               values_to = "value")

# Define consistent colors and labels
site_colors <- c("Warm lowland" = "coral1", "Cool highland" = "cornflowerblue")

theme_publication <- theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title = element_blank())

# ============== PANEL A: Growth curves ==============
# Load growth data
growth_data_all <- read.csv("Growthcurvedata.csv", 
                            na.strings = c("", ",", "NA", "."), 
                            header = TRUE)

# Load von Bertalanffy models for adults (ages 2+)
# If you have these saved, load them; otherwise you'll need to fit them
# fit_vb_OR <- readRDS("growth_models/fit_vb_OR.rds")
# fit_vb_CP <- readRDS("growth_models/fit_vb_CP.rds")
# early_model_quad <- readRDS("growth_models/early_model_quad.rds")

# Or fit them quickly (assuming growth_data_all is available):
growth_data_adults <- growth_data_all %>% 
  filter(!is.na(FSVLAFTER), !is.na(SITE.), 
         !is.na(Age), !is.na(FEMID.),
         Age >= 2)

growth_data_OR <- growth_data_adults %>% filter(SITE. == "OR")
growth_data_CP <- growth_data_adults %>% filter(SITE. == "CP")

fit_vb_OR <- nlme(
  FSVLAFTER ~ Linf * (1 - exp(-K * (Age - t0))),
  data = growth_data_OR,
  fixed = Linf + K + t0 ~ 1,
  random = Linf ~ 1 | FEMID.,
  start = c(Linf = 74, K = 0.044, t0 = 0),
  control = nlmeControl(maxIter = 200, msMaxIter = 200))

fit_vb_CP <- nlme(
  FSVLAFTER ~ Linf * (1 - exp(-K * (Age - t0))),
  data = growth_data_CP,
  fixed = Linf + K + t0 ~ 1,
  random = Linf ~ 1 | FEMID.,
  start = c(Linf = 89, K = 0.044, t0 = 0),
  control = nlmeControl(maxIter = 200, msMaxIter = 200))

# Fit quadratic model for early growth (ages 0-2)
early_growth <- growth_data_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(FSVLAFTER), !is.na(SITE.), 
         !is.na(Age), Age <= 2) %>%
  mutate(Site = factor(SITE., levels = c("OR", "CP")))

early_model_quad <- lm(FSVLAFTER ~ poly(Age, 2) * Site, data = early_growth)

# Generate predictions for ages 2+ (von Bertalanffy)
newdata_OR <- data.frame(Age = seq(2, 14, length.out = 100))
newdata_CP <- data.frame(Age = seq(2, 14, length.out = 100))

pred_OR <- newdata_OR %>%
  mutate(
    FSVLAFTER = predict(fit_vb_OR, newdata = newdata_OR, level = 0),
    Site = "OR")

pred_CP <- newdata_CP %>%
  mutate(
    FSVLAFTER = predict(fit_vb_CP, newdata = newdata_CP, level = 0),
    Site = "CP")

# Bootstrap confidence intervals
set.seed(123)

boot_predict_OR <- function() {
  beta <- fixef(fit_vb_OR)
  vcov_beta <- vcov(fit_vb_OR)
  sim_beta <- MASS::mvrnorm(1, beta, vcov_beta)
  Linf_sim * (1 - exp(-K_sim * (newdata_OR$Age - t0_sim)))
}

boot_OR <- replicate(1000, boot_predict_OR())
pred_OR$lower <- apply(boot_OR, 1, quantile, 0.025)
pred_OR$upper <- apply(boot_OR, 1, quantile, 0.975)

boot_predict_CP <- function() {
  beta <- fixef(fit_vb_CP)
  vcov_beta <- vcov(fit_vb_CP)
  sim_beta <- MASS::mvrnorm(1, beta, vcov_beta)
  Linf_sim * (1 - exp(-K_sim * (newdata_CP$Age - t0_sim)))
}

boot_CP <- replicate(1000, boot_predict_CP())
pred_CP$lower <- apply(boot_CP, 1, quantile, 0.025)
pred_CP$upper <- apply(boot_CP, 1, quantile, 0.975)

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_OR, pred_CP)

# Generate predictions for ages 0-2 (quadratic)
early_pred <- expand.grid(
  Age = seq(0, 2, length.out = 100),
  Site = factor(c("OR", "CP"), levels = c("OR", "CP"))
)

pred_with_ci <- predict(early_model_quad, newdata = early_pred, 
                        interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)
early_pred$FSVLAFTER <- pred_with_ci[, "fit"]
early_pred$lower <- pred_with_ci[, "lwr"]
early_pred$upper <- pred_with_ci[, "upr"]

# Extract asymptote values
Linf_OR <- fixef(fit_vb_OR)["Linf"]
Linf_CP <- fixef(fit_vb_CP)["Linf"]

# Recode site labels to match other panels
growth_data_plot <- growth_data_all %>%
  mutate(site = recode(SITE., 
                       "CP" = "Cool highland",
                       "OR" = "Warm lowland"))

early_pred <- early_pred %>%
  mutate(site = recode(Site,
                       "CP" = "Cool highland",
                       "OR" = "Warm lowland"))

pred_all <- pred_all %>%
  mutate(site = recode(Site,
                       "CP" = "Cool highland",
                       "OR" = "Warm lowland"))

# Create plot
p_growth <- ggplot() +
  # Raw data - ALL AGES
  geom_jitter(data = growth_data_plot, 
              aes(x = Age, y = FSVLAFTER, colour = site),
              width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
  # Quadratic predictions for ages 0-2
  geom_line(data = early_pred, 
            aes(x = Age, y = FSVLAFTER, colour = site), 
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(data = early_pred, 
              aes(x = Age, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = site), 
              alpha = 0.2) +
  # Von Bertalanffy predictions for ages 2+
  geom_line(data = pred_all, 
            aes(x = Age, y = FSVLAFTER, colour = site), 
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_all, 
              aes(x = Age, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = site), 
              alpha = 0.2) +
  # Asymptote lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = Linf_OR, 
             colour = "coral1", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = Linf_CP, 
             colour = "cornflowerblue", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 2), limits = c(0, 12)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "Snout-vent length (mm)") +
  theme_publication +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_growth

# ============== PANEL B: Cumulative offspring ==============
# Prepare data
cumulative_data <- data %>%
  arrange(indID, Age) %>%
  group_by(indID, site) %>%
  mutate(
    cumulative_offspring = cumsum(nOffspring),
    reproductive_event = row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Age >= 2 & Age <= 12) %>%  # Filter to stable age range
  mutate(site = recode(site,
                       "CP" = "Cool highland",
                       "OR" = "Warm lowland"))

# Calculate population means and CIs
cumulative_summary <- cumulative_data %>%
  group_by(site, Age) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_cumulative = mean(cumulative_offspring),
    se = sd(cumulative_offspring) / sqrt(n()),
    lower_ci = mean_cumulative - 1.96 * se,
    upper_ci = mean_cumulative + 1.96 * se,
    .groups = 'drop')

p_cumulative <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = cumulative_data, 
            aes(x = Age, y = cumulative_offspring, 
                group = indID, color = site),
            alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_ribbon(data = cumulative_summary,
              aes(x = Age, ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci, fill = site),
              alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = cumulative_summary,
            aes(x = Age, y = mean_cumulative, color = site),
            linewidth = 1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2, 12, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 55, 10)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "Cumulative offspring") +
  theme_publication +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_cumulative

# ============== PANEL C: Fertility trajectories (BaFTA) ==============
p_fertility <- ggplot(fert_data, aes(x = age, y = median, color = site, fill = site)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2, 12, 2), limits = c(2, 12)) +
  labs(y = "Expected litter size", x = "Age (years)") +
  theme_publication +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_fertility

# ============== PANEL D: Mortality hazard (BaSTA) ==============
# Define trajectory extraction function
calculate_trajectories_from_mcmc <- function(basta_out, site_name, ages = 2:14) {
  params <- as.data.frame(basta_out$params)
  
  trajectories <- lapply(1:nrow(params), function(i) {
    b0 <- params$b0[i]
    b1 <- params$b1[i]
    c <- params$c[i]
    
    hazard <- exp(b0 + b1 * ages) + c
    
    data.frame(
      iteration = i,
      age = ages,
      hazard = hazard,
      site = site_name
    )
  })
  
  all_traj <- bind_rows(trajectories)
  
  hazard_summary <- all_traj %>%
    group_by(age, site) %>%
    summarise(
      median = median(hazard),
      lower = quantile(hazard, 0.025),
      upper = quantile(hazard, 0.975),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  list(hazard = hazard_summary)
}

# Extract trajectories from BaSTA outputstraj_OR_GM <- calculate_trajectories_from_mcmc(out_OR_GM, "Warm lowland")
traj_CP <- calculate_trajectories_from_mcmc(out_CP, "Cool highland")
haz_data <- bind_rows(traj_OR_GM$hazard, traj_CP$hazard)

p_mortality <- ggplot(haz_data, aes(x = age, y = median, color = site, fill = site)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2, 12, 2), limits = c(2, 12)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "Mortality hazard μ(x)") +
  theme_publication +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_mortality

# ============== PANEL E: BaFTA parameter densities ==============
p_bafta_params <- ggplot(params_combined, aes(x = value, fill = site, color = site)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 1,
             labeller = labeller(parameter = c(
               "b0" = "b₀ (baseline fertility)",
               "b3" = "b₃ (senescence rate)"))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  labs(x = "Parameter value", y = "Posterior density") +
  theme_publication +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0))

p_bafta_params

# ============== PANEL F: Reproductive value ==============
# Reproductive value v(x) = (1/l(x)) * sum[l(a) * m(a)] for a >= x
# Requires: lx from BaSTA life tables + expected fecundity from BaFTA

# Extract lx from life tables (ages 2-12)
lx_OR <- out_OR_WE_final$lifeTable$noCov$Mean %>%
  filter(Ages >= 2, Ages <= 12) %>%
  select(age = Ages, lx)

lx_CP <- out_CP_GM_final$lifeTable$noCov$Mean %>%
  filter(Ages >= 2, Ages <= 12) %>%
  select(age = Ages, lx)

# Extract expected fecundity from BaFTA (mean fertility at each age)
mx_OR <- data.frame(
  age = out_CM_OR$x,
  mx  = out_CM_OR$fert[, "Mean"]) %>%
  filter(age >= 2, age <= 12)

mx_CP <- data.frame(
  age = out_CM_CP$x,
  mx  = out_CM_CP$fert[, "Mean"]) %>%
  filter(age >= 2, age <= 12)

calc_repro_value_smooth <- function(lx_df, mx_df, site_name, age_step = 0.1) {
  
# Interpolate lx and mx to finer age grid
  ages_fine <- seq(2, 12, by = age_step)
  
  lx_smooth <- spline(lx_df$age, lx_df$lx, xout = ages_fine)$y
  lx_smooth <- pmax(0, lx_smooth)  # prevent negative values
  
  mx_smooth <- spline(mx_df$age, mx_df$mx, xout = ages_fine)$y
  mx_smooth <- pmax(0, mx_smooth)  # prevent negative values
  
# Calculate reproductive value on fine grid
  rv <- sapply(seq_along(ages_fine), function(i) {
    future <- seq(i, length(ages_fine))
    sum(lx_smooth[future] * mx_smooth[future]) / lx_smooth[i]
  })
  
  data.frame(age = ages_fine, rv = rv, site = site_name)
}

rv_OR <- calc_repro_value_smooth(lx_OR, mx_OR, "Warm lowland")
rv_CP <- calc_repro_value_smooth(lx_CP, mx_CP, "Cool highland")
rv_data <- bind_rows(rv_OR, rv_CP)


# Plot
p_repro_value <- ggplot(rv_data, aes(x = age, y = rv, color = site)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2, 12, 2)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "Reproductive value") +
  theme_publication +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_repro_value

# ============== COMBINE ALL PANELS ==============
fig_combined <- plot_grid(
  p_growth, p_cumulative,
  p_fertility, p_mortality,
  p_bafta_params, p_basta_params,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 3,
  labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),
  label_size = 14,
  rel_widths = c(1.2, 1))

fig_combined

# Save
ggsave("Figure_comprehensive_six_panel.png", 
       fig_combined,
       width = 10, height = 12, 
       units = "in",
       dpi = 600)

ggsave("Figure_comprehensive_six_panel.pdf", 
       fig_combined,
       width = 10, height = 12, 
       units = "in")
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
